buttonMessage.description: Click the button below to request access to our Minecraft server

messages.ticket.embed.denied.title: ❌ Ticket Denied
messages.whitelist.modal.requestInvalidFormat: ❌ Invalid Minecraft username format. Username must be 3-16 characters long and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.
messages.ticket.instructions:
**📋 Instructions:**

**For {userMention}:**
• Upload a clip/video showing you disconnected unintentionally (crash, internet issue, etc.)
• Accepted platforms: YouTube, Twitch, Streamable, Medal.tv, or Discord upload
• You have **{minutes} minutes** to submit proof
• If no proof is submitted, you will be killed on your next login

**For Staff:**
• Click **{approveLabel}** to clear the punishment
• Click **{denyLabel}** to confirm the punishment
• Click **{extendLabel}** to give more time
• Or use `/info <incident_id>` for details
messages.ticket.embed.approved.desc: Player will NOT be punished on next login.

messages.ticket.modal.admit.title: 🔴 Admit Combat Logging
messages.ticket.notification.value.whatHappened: You disconnected while in combat with another player.
messages.ticket.embed.admit.desc:
You admitted to combat logging. Same consequences as denial apply:
• You WILL be killed on next login
• Your items are in a player head at logout location
• Opponents can access for 30 minutes
• After 30 min, everyone can access

Thank you for your honesty.
